_meta.description: TamisTool baseline table catalog for Microsoft Sentinel and Defender.
_meta.note: Add new tables here without code changes. Fields: name, description, source, required_fields, use_cases.

tables.name: SecurityAlert
tables.description: Alerts generated by Microsoft Sentinel analytics rules and connected security products.

tables.name: SecurityEvent
tables.description: Windows Security Event Log data ingested via Azure Monitor Agent or MMA.

tables.name: SignInLogs
tables.description: Azure Active Directory sign-in activity logs.

tables.name: AuditLogs
tables.description: Azure Active Directory audit events (user, group, app, directory changes).

tables.name: CommonSecurityLog
tables.description: CEF-formatted logs from third-party security appliances via Syslog/AMA.

tables.name: DeviceEvents
tables.description: Miscellaneous device-level events from Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

tables.name: DeviceNetworkEvents
tables.description: Network connection events from Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

tables.name: DeviceProcessEvents
tables.description: Process creation and execution events from Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

tables.name: DeviceFileEvents
tables.description: File creation, modification, and deletion events from Defender for Endpoint.

tables.name: DeviceLogonEvents
tables.description: Logon and authentication events from Defender for Endpoint.

tables.name: OfficeActivity
tables.description: Microsoft 365 audit log events (Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive).

tables.name: AzureActivity
tables.description: Azure subscription-level activity log (resource operations, RBAC changes).

tables.name: Syslog
tables.description: Generic Syslog messages from Linux systems and appliances.

tables.name: WindowsFirewall
tables.description: Windows Firewall events from Windows hosts.

tables.name: AzureDiagnostics
tables.description: Diagnostic logs from Azure PaaS resources (Key Vault, App Service, etc.).
